commands.review_summary:
The PR marks generation-mismatched Telegram draft previews as retained and updates the matching race regression test/harness.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests -4. Total -3 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main can emit a generation-mismatched superseded preview without `retain`, and dispatch deletes non-retained superseded previews. I did not run tests because this review was read-only, but the existing race test and PR proof cover the path.
